sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 1:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 1:1
items.html: These are the vessels of the Sefirot of the Guf, meaning the emanated beings from the screen of the Peh of Rosh downwards. (Part 3, Chapter 8, item 1)
